# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up the environment..."
          # Add any environment setup commands here
  
      - name: Execute custom build script
        run: |
          if [ -f ./build.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./build.sh
            ./build.sh
          else
            echo "No build script found!"
          fi
      
      - name: Execute custom deployment command
        run: |
          if [ -f ./deploy.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./deploy.sh
            ./deploy.sh
          else
            echo "No deployment script found!"
          fi

      - name: Clean up
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning up..."
          # Add any cleanup commands here
